center.name: 愛德華·布萊思
center.summary: 愛德華·布萊思是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联33种鸟类，包括白颊山鹧鸪、棕腹鹰鹃、灰林鸽等33种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Andaman serpent eagle (Spilornis elgini), also known as the Andaman dark-serpent eagle or the dark serpent eagle, is a medium-sized bird in the family Accipitridae, the raptor family, that is only found in India on the Andaman Islands. It is currently classified as vulnerable and is experiencing population declines

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The green warbler (Phylloscopus nitidus), also known as green willow warbler or green leaf warbler, is a leaf warbler found in the Caucasus Mountains in southeastern Europe

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Bandipur, India]] | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Plocealauda | species = affinis | authority = (Blyth, 1845) | range_map=MirafraMap.svg | range_map_caption = range in bright green | synonyms = * Mirafra assamica affinis }} Jerdon's bush lark (Plocealauda affinis) or Jerdon's lark is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in south Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Pellorneum rostratum |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22715792A260307448 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22715792A260307448.en |access-date=27 May 2025}} | genus = Pellorneum | species = rostratum | authority = (Blyth, 1842) | synonyms = }} The Malayan swamp babbler (Pellorneum rostratum), previously named the white-chested babbler, is a species of bird in the ground babbler family, Pellorneidae, that is found in the Malay Peninsula, Sumatra, the Riau Islands, the Lingga Islands and the island of Belitung

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The mangrove whistler (Pachycephala cinerea) is a species of bird in the family Pachycephalidae found in South-east Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The plain-backed sparrow (Passer flaveolus), also called the Pegu sparrow or olive-backed sparrow, is a sparrow found in Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rufous-vented grass babbler or rufous-vented prinia (Laticilla burnesii) is a small warbler in the family Pellorneidae that occurs in Pakistan, northwestern India and Nepal

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Somali sparrow (Passer castanopterus) is a species of bird in the family Passeridae found in Somalia, Djibouti, Ethiopia and Kenya

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: roonwali, with female on right | image2 =Ceylon frogmouth.ogg | image2_caption = Calls | genus = Batrachostomus | species = moniliger | authority = Blyth, 1849 }} The Sri Lanka frogmouth, Sri Lankan frogmouth or Ceylon frogmouth (Batrachostomus moniliger) is a small frogmouth found in the Western Ghats of south India and Sri Lanka

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Tickell's brown hornbill (Anorrhinus tickelli), also known as the rusty-cheeked hornbill, is a species of hornbill found in forests in Burma and adjacent western Thailand

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | taxon = Phylloscopus occipitalis | authority = (Blyth, 1845) }} thumb|Eggs of Phylloscopus occipitalis MHNT The western crowned warbler (Phylloscopus occipitalis) is a leaf warbler which breeds in Central Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The large-billed leaf warbler (Phylloscopus magnirostris) is a species of migratory leaf warbler (family Phylloscopidae) found in Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Plocealauda | species = erythroptera | authority = (Blyth, 1845) | synonyms = | range_map = Mirafra erythroptera distribution map.png }} The Indian bush lark (Plocealauda erythroptera) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in South Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The eared pitta (Hydrornis phayrei) is a species of bird in the pitta family, Pittidae, and is found in Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The sand lark (Alaudala raytal) is a small passerine bird in the lark family, Alaudidae, found in southern Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Himalayan owl or Himalayan wood owl (Strix nivicolum) is a medium-sized owl native to the forests and mountain ranges of the Himalayas, Taiwan and Korea.{{Cite journal |last=del Hoyo |first=Josep |last2=Collar |first2=Nigel |last3=Marks |first3=Jeffrey S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rufous woodpecker (Micropternus brachyurus) is a medium-sized brown woodpecker native to South and Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2016 |title=Hierococcyx nisicolor |volume=2016 |article-number=e.T22734046A95072929 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2016-3.RLTS.T22734046A95072929.en |access-date=4 April 2023}} | genus = Hierococcyx | species = nisicolor | authority = (Blyth, 1843) | synonyms = }} Hodgson's hawk-cuckoo (Hierococcyx nisicolor), also known as the whistling hawk-cuckoo is a species of cuckoo found in north-eastern India, Myanmar, southern China and southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Ashy thorated warbler found in Nepal The ashy-throated warbler (Phylloscopus maculipennis) is a species of leaf warbler (family Phylloscopidae)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The grey-headed lapwing (Vanellus cinereus) is a lapwing species which breeds in northeast China and Japan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Columba | species = pulchricollis | authority = Blyth, 1846 | range_map = | synonyms = }} thumb|Ashy wood Pigeon, Khonoma, Nagaland The ashy wood pigeon (Columba pulchricollis) is a member of the bird family Columbidae, found in temperate forests of southeastern Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | taxon = Phylloscopus griseolus | authority = Blyth, 1847 }} The sulphur-bellied warbler (Phylloscopus griseolus) is a species of leaf-warbler found in the Palearctic region (Afghanistan, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, Mongolia, Russian Federation [Central Asian Russia], Tajikistan and Turkmenistan)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-cheeked partridge (Arborophila atrogularis) is a species of partridge in the family Phasianidae, native to Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-browed shrike-babbler (Pteruthius aeralatus) is a bird species found in the eastern Himalayas and Southeast Asia from northern Burma to southern Cambodia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The fire-breasted flowerpecker (Dicaeum ignipectus) is a species of bird in the family Dicaeidae found in the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The blue-eared barbet (Psilopogon cyanotis) is a barbet in the Megalaimidae family native to mainland Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Jerdon's baza (Aviceda jerdoni) is a moderate sized brown hawk with a thin white-tipped black crest usually held erect. It is found in South-east Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The dusky warbler (Phylloscopus fuscatus) is a leaf warbler which breeds in the east Palearctic

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The golden-throated barbet (Psilopogon franklinii) is an Asian barbet native to Southeast Asia, where it inhabits foremost forests between altitude

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Lioparus | parent_authority = Oates, 1889 | species = chrysotis | authority = (Blyth, 1845) | synonyms = * Proparus chrysaeus * Alcippe chrysaea }} The golden-breasted fulvetta (Lioparus chrysotis) is a species of songbird found in Bhutan, China, India, Myanmar, Nepal, and Vietnam

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pin-tailed green pigeon or pin-tailed pigeon (Treron apicauda) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae native to Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-rumped honeyguide (Indicator xanthonotus) is a sparrow-sized bird in the honeyguide family that is found in Asia, mainly in montane forests along the Himalayas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Chelidorhynx hypoxanthus |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22706775A264228927 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22706775A264228927.en |access-date=18 December 2025}} | genus = Chelidorhynx | parent_authority = Blyth, 1843 | species = hypoxanthus | authority = (Blyth, 1843) | synonyms = *Rhipidura hypoxantha Blyth, 1843 *Chelidorhynx hypoxantha }} The yellow-bellied fantail (Chelidorhynx hypoxanthus), also known as the yellow-bellied fairy-fantail, is found in the Indian subcontinent, the Himalayas, and portions of Southeast Asia including Thailand, Vietnam, and Myanmar. It is an altitudinal migrant.{{cite taxon |BOW |author=Boles, W.|year= 2020|title= Yellow-bellied Fairy-Fantail (Chelidorhynx hypoxanthus)|version= 1.0|editor=J
